flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of the Pacific rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($11.0k → $14.2k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of the Pacific rose 18% between 2007 and 2010 ($29.0k → $34.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of the Pacific fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).
